decisions.title: Choose the first V3.1 runtime expansion based on the completed V3.0 benchmark evidence
decisions.why_now: V3.0 is complete, so the next product decision is which proven expansion should lead the V3.1 slice.

options.label: Expand feedback clustering and recommendation automation first
tradeoffs: Builds directly on the new V3.0 runtime and queue foundation
Delays deeper longitudinal memory work until more post-launch evidence arrives

options.label: Invest in deeper PM behavior-pattern memory first
tradeoffs: Could improve downstream context reuse faster
Carries more reliability risk before the post-launch evidence base is larger

decisions.consequence_of_delay: The V3.1 roadmap will drift without using the completed V3.0 benchmark and runtime proof evidence.
